---
title: "NeuroArchitecture Exp2 LMM for mean ratings"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---


# Data preparation
## Load the libraries
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
```

## Read data
```{r}
source("load_data.R")
```
```{r}
head(df)
```



# Modelling
## Model selection

```{r}
m1 <- lmer(mean_rating ~ Category + Group + (1 | Participant) + (1 | ImageNumber), data=df)
m2 <- lmer(mean_rating ~ Category * Group + (1 | Participant) + (1 | ImageNumber), data=df)
anova(m1, m2)
```


```{r}
m3 <- lmer(mean_rating ~ Category * Group + (1 + Category | Participant) + (1 | ImageNumber), 
           data = df)
anova(m3, m2)
```

```{r}
m4 <- lmer(mean_rating ~ Category * Group + (1 + Category | Participant) + (1 + Group | ImageNumber), 
           data = df)
anova(m3, m4)
```




## Best model

```{r}
best_model <- m4
summary(best_model)
Anova(best_model)
```
## Post hoc
```{r}
emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 3700) 
emm_options(lmerTest.limit = 3700)
# This calculates the mean rating for each combination of Group and Category
emm_results <- emmeans(best_model, ~ Group * Category)

# --- 2. Perform Pairwise Comparisons ---
# We split the comparison by Category to see the Group difference in Minus and Plus separately
# 'adjust = "tukey"' handles multiple comparison correction
post_hoc_stats <- pairs(emm_results, by = "Category", reverse = TRUE, adjust = "tukey")

# Display the statistical results (t-ratio, p-values, and estimates)
cat("\n--- Post-hoc Comparisons: Control vs ASD within each Category ---\n")
summary(post_hoc_stats, infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))
```

```{r}
# This focuses on the magnitude of the difference between groups
cat("\n--- Effect Sizes (Cohen's d) ---\n")
eff_size_results <- eff_size(emm_results, sigma = sigma(best_model), edf = df.residual(best_model))

# Extracting only the estimate to keep the output clean as requested
print(eff_size_results)
```


# Plotting
```{r}
interaction_plot <- emmip(best_model, Group ~ Category, CIs = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Interaction Effect: Group by Category",
       y = "Estimated Marginal Mean (Rating)",
       x = "Stimulus Category") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("ASD" = "#F8766D", "Control" = "#00BFC4"))

print(interaction_plot)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(df, aes(x = mean_rating, fill = Group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~Category) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Distribution Density of Mean Rating: ASD vs Control",
       x = "Mean Rating", y = "Density") +
  theme(
    # hjust = 0.5 centers the text
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14)
  )
```
